steps.title: Identify the grammatical structure
steps.content: ”By reducing the runoff flowing into city sewers,” is a participial phrase (dependent modifier). The blank requires a complete independent clause as the main clause of the sentence.

steps.title: Apply the rule
steps.content:
The rule is that a participial phrase's action must be performed by the subject of the main clause that follows.

Choice B correctly uses “the bioswales” as the subject—they perform the reducing.

Choices A, C, and D use “mitigation” or “flooding and pollution” as subjects, but neither logically performs the action of reducing.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
